data.description:
Trident evolutionary high-leverage move (Claude framing, supported by Codex's "chrome budget" and Gemini's "Pluggable Tool-Shelf"): the toolbar buttons (Terminal/Browser/Markdown/SplitH/SplitV/+) are c11mux concerns living inside a generic split-tab library. Extracting them into a c11mux-side accessory slot does four things at once:

1. Eliminates the bug class structurally (host owns the chrome it provides; bonsplit just reserves space for whatever the host hands it).
2. Shrinks bonsplit toward genuine reusability for a second Stage 11 project.
3. Moves c11mux-specific concepts (terminal/browser/markdown surface kinds) to the host that owns them.
4. Spins a flywheel: Lattice or future Stage 11 projects could use bonsplit with a different accessory cluster.

Sketch: bonsplit exposes a `trailingAccessory` view-builder slot on `TabBarView`, with measured intrinsic width feeding back into `trailingTabContentInset`. Bonsplit no longer hard-codes button identities or counts; the constant goes away entirely.

Strategic, not tactical. File-and-let-mature; revisit if (a) third regression of this bug class occurs, or (b) we need bonsplit in a second project.
data.title: Bonsplit ↔ c11mux: TrailingAccessory slot — extract toolbar buttons out of bonsplit

data.note: Strategic evolutionary direction surfaced during CMUX-22 review

provenance.reason: Moving to planning alongside CMUX-31; kicking off parallel plan agent

data.note: Atin direction 2026-04-19: skip tactical fix, go direct to architectural answer
CMUX-31's measurement mechanism becomes CMUX-30 Phase 1 (internal plumbing + EmptyView default, before host migration)

provenance.reason: Orchestrator booted; starting clear-codex plan review (Phase 0)

data.body: Clear-codex plan review complete. 4 blockers surfaced, all resolvable into 'take the staged path the ticket\'s 2026-04-19 update already chose': (1) keep `"terminal"` delegate arm — empty-space & drop-zone paths use it (bonsplit TabBarView L430-440, L743-752); Phase 2 keeps the arm too, not just for keyboard shortcuts. (2) Phase 1 must NOT delete in-bonsplit `splitButtons` — §3 'EmptyView semantics' is wrong; staged path: Phase 1 renders `splitButtons` as the internal default accessory for `TrailingAccessory == EmptyView` callers; Phase 2 c11mux swaps in its own; Phase 3 deletes the internal default. Zero behavior change for unchanged callers in Phase 1. (3) Generic `some View` threading will not compile — must thread `TrailingAccessory: View` end-to-end through SplitViewContainer / SplitNodeView / SplitContainerView / PaneContainerView / SinglePaneWrapper.Coordinator, or fall back to `AnyView` with an explicit comment. (4) SemVer is still minor-additive because Phase 1 preserves behavior for omitted accessories. Important items folded in: backdrop frame = accessoryWidth+24pt fade (not bare accessoryWidth), behavioral tests over fragile introspection, drag-source saturation exposed via `chromeSaturation: Double` not raw `isFocused`, `let workspace` not `@ObservedObject` in the host accessory (Phase 2 scope). Minimal-mode per operator default B-1 (bonsplit publishes `@Environment(\.bonsplitTabBarHover)`). Proceeding to Phase 1 dispatch. Full review: /tmp/cmux-30-codex-review.md.

Phase 1 codex dispatched on surface:66 (pane:40). Prompt at /tmp/cmux-30-phase-1-prompt.md addresses all 4 blockers from plan review via staged path: Phase 1 keeps splitButtons as internal default accessory; zero visible behavior change for unchanged callers; generic TrailingAccessory threaded end-to-end (fallback AnyView at NSHostingController coordinator only); backdrop = accessoryWidth + 24pt fade; chromeSaturation (Double) exposed instead of raw isFocused; minimal-mode via new `@Environment(\.bonsplitTabBarHover)` value; behavioral tests only. Orchestrator will verify via `./scripts/reload.sh --tag cmux-30-phase1` when codex reports ready.

Phase 1 bonsplit PR open: https://github.com/Stage-11-Agentics/bonsplit/pull/2 (branch `cmux-30-trailing-accessory`, commit `3f28c16`, +475 −62 across 10 files). Tagged DEV build `cmux-30-phase1` built and launched successfully (exit 0). Genuine end-to-end generic threading of `TrailingAccessory: View` through every container + NSHostingController coordinator — no AnyView needed. Source-compat verified: both existing `BonsplitView(controller:content:emptyPane:)` and `BonsplitView(controller:content:)` initializers still compile via `where TrailingAccessory == EmptyView` extensions. Visual smoke test deferred to Atin (headless orchestrator). Kicked off clear-codex PR review; results → /tmp/cmux-30-phase-1-pr-review.md. **Awaiting Atin merge.** Phase 2 dispatch blocked on merge per orchestrator brief.

Phase 2 prompt prepared at /tmp/cmux-30-phase-2-prompt.md. Awaiting (a) Atin merge of bonsplit PR #2 and (b) Atin-provided target bonsplit SHA to populate /tmp/cmux-30-phase-2-bonsplit-sha.txt. Phase 2 will: bump vendor/bonsplit → create Sources/Panels/TabBarTrailingAccessory.swift → promote createNewTabOfFocusedKind to internal → wire into WorkspaceContentView.swift:61 (4-arg init) → localize 6 tooltip keys (EN+JA) → trim splitTabBar delegate (keep "terminal" arm only). Bonsplit splitButtons rendering stays until Phase 3. Clear-codex PR review still in flight; will post findings when complete.

Clear-codex PR review hung (no output after 30+ min); killed. Posted orchestrator-authored diff review to bonsplit PR #2 instead (covers all phase-contract checks + plan §13 blockers; recommends ship). Waiting for Atin to merge and drop merge SHA at /tmp/cmux-30-phase-2-bonsplit-sha.txt. Phase 2 codex dispatch is ready to fire the moment the file appears.

Phase 1 bonsplit PR #2 merged → `a45400dc0dae171d31b59c85f333d3da87d96178` on bonsplit/origin/main. Combined Phase 2+3 codex launched on surface:71 (new tab in orchestrator pane per operator instruction). Prompt at /tmp/cmux-30-phase-2-and-3-prompt.md. Codex will implement Phase 2 (c11mux host accessory), stop for orchestrator push/merge, then resume with GO PHASE 3 to implement Phase 3 (bonsplit cleanup → 2.0.0).

Phase 2 c11mux PR open: https://github.com/Stage-11-Agentics/c11mux/pull/29 (branch `cmux-30-host-trailing-accessory`, 4 atomic commits, +840 −60 across 6 files). Tagged DEV build `cmux-30-phase2` built and launched successfully (exit 0, PID 81271). Bonsplit pointer at Phase 1 merge `a45400d`. Six toolbar buttons now host-supplied via `TabBarTrailingAccessory.swift`; bonsplit internal `splitButtons` row still renders as zero-regression insurance. Phase 3 codex waits on surface:71 for `GO PHASE 3` signal after this PR merges. Visual smoke test deferred to @atin (headless orchestrator).
Bailed on the prior Phase 2 attempt — the work it reverted caused issues. PR #29 closed, branch cmux-30-host-trailing-accessory deleted locally and on remote. Back to planned; replan before retrying.

data.reason: Bailing on Phase 2 attempt; PR #29 closed and branch deleted. Needs replan before retry.

provenance.reason: Bailing on Phase 2 attempt; PR #29 closed and branch deleted. Needs replan before retry.

data.reason: File-and-let-mature spike per ticket description; Phase 2 (PR #29) was bailed on 2026-04-20 and neither resurrection trigger (third regression of bug class, or bonsplit needed in a second project) has fired. Phase 1 (bonsplit PR #2) is merged. Park in backlog until a trigger condition appears.
